title: notogrammitis garrettii
intro: Notogrammitis garrettii, also known as the Garrett's button fern, is a species of small fern native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Notogrammitis garrettii is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. The herbal preparations of Notogrammitis garrettii typically involve drying and processing the leaves for use in teas, tinctures, or capsules.
